sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel movement data documented for NES port

special_mechanics.name: Helicopter Flight Movement
special_mechanics.description: Player controls attack helicopter with continuous scrolling background. Movement mechanics not documented.

special_mechanics.name: Respawn System (Regional Variant)
special_mechanics.description: Japanese version: plane moves forward during explosion and respawns slightly ahead of death location. US version: plane stays in same spot before respawn.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - No quantitative physics parameters documented. Twin Cobra NES is a port of the 1987 Toaplan arcade game. Sources contain only qualitative gameplay descriptions and regional differences. Movement/physics mechanics not detailed in available documentation.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Twin Cobra (NES)
